title: 夢だもん、あきらめないよ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts draw closer. One day, during a trip to the shopping
district, I hear a familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Carrots! Get your carrots here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, long time no see! Hehe, I'm helping the carrot farmer sell his
stock!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: He opens a stall here in the local farmer market every once in a while, but he's got a ton of leftovers this time.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We can sell these if we put our minds to it, though! Who wouldn't
want a tasty carrot?

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the thought, Urara, but that's enough. It's my own darn
fault for bringing so many carrots.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! We just gotta get people's attention, and those carrots
will fly off the cart! Carrots! Get your carrots here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when faced with a literal mountain of unsold carrots, Haru
Urara's determined cries never waver.

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit, Urara! Come on, folks, we can't let her have ALL the
fun!

text_block_list.name: Vegetable Seller
text_block_list.text:
In that case... Come and get it! I'll offer a deal on onions and
potatoes to anyone buying carrots! Perfect for curry or stew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before long, the shopping district is abuzz with activity, all thanks to
Haru Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Woohoo, all the carrots are gone!

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text:
Who would've thought I'd sell every last carrot... I couldn't have
asked for more. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
No problem! I'm just glad I could tell people how tasty your carrots
are!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Th-there you are!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, King! Sorry, but the carrots are all gone.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, phooey! I'm late to the party... not! Aren't you forgetting
something? You should be training right now!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, my bad, but the carrot farmer was in trouble! I couldn't just
ignore him.

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't be too mad at her, miss. Our little Urara here was busy teaching
me a very important lesson—

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: To never give up, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! And I couldn't let those carrots go to waste!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I-I haven't the slightest idea what you're going on about...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... At least you had a reason for skipping training.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However! You shouldn't disappear without a word like that though!
Do you know how worried Special Week was?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! Then I better go apologize to her right away!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, wait!

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Bahaha! Always bursting with energy, that one. At this rate, her dream
of finishing first isn't far off from coming true!
choice_data_list: Taking first place is her dream?
Taking first place is her dream?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you didn't know? Haru Urara has never finished first place, even
in training or the scrimmages.

text_block_list.name: Fish Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but she never gives up or even gets discouraged. She just
keeps running with a smile on her face. Amazing, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As long as she keeps her head up, she still has a chance. Of course,
an invincible racer like me has no such worries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, I recall Haru Urara mentioning first place a few times,
but who would've thought it was such a big issue for her?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the reason I find her so compelling... is that steadfast
dedication to achieving her dream.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho—H-hold on, don't ignore me! I demand my due respect!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew... Let's do the dirt course next.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, the tryouts aren't far off! I really gotta kick it into gear if I
wanna take first place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I wonder what winning feels like...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I mean, running on its own is already so fun. If I take first place, I bet
I'd be doing backflips!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah! I am an Umamusume, after all! I love running, but I want to win too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And as long as I keep up my training, I'm sure I'll take first place
someday! I won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So I better get back to it! Up next is... the dirt course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's sunny outlook continues to shine on despite her track
record.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She comes off as a little naive, but at the same time... I can't help but
want to see her win.
choice_data_list: Want me to help you train?
Want me to help you train?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really?! Could you?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, to be honest, I don't really know if I'm doing this whole
training thing right, so having you here will be a big help!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: All right, just you watch! I'll show you what I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I quietly observe Haru Urara's practice, my calling as a trainer is
even more compelled to help this dreamer reach her goal.
